title: oxalis reflexa
intro: Oxalis reflexa, also known as the wood sorrel or purple wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its high oxalic acid content, which has been shown to have antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxalis reflexa include its potential to act as an antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and digestive issues. Oxalis reflexa is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can be used in various herbal preparations, including salves and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
